description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a spacious, open-plan layout and large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides. The structure features a central courtyard with a prominent tree, visible from the main living areas, and several rooms arranged around this open space. The exterior is predominantly white with clean, geometric lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. There are multiple outdoor terraces and balconies, as well as a driveway with a parked car and landscaped elements such as trees. The house appears to be single-story, with a focus on indoor-outdoor living and abundant natural light. The use of glass, concrete, and metal is evident throughout the design, contributing to its sleek and minimalist appearance.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a central courtyard, featuring open-plan living and minimalist design. The exterior is white with geometric lines, outdoor terraces, and landscaped elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central courtyard with a tree, large glass windows, and a car parked in the driveway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, multiple rooms, outdoor terraces, and landscaped trees at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view with symmetrical arrangement, visible entryway, and landscaped trees, emphasizing the house's width and open layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view showing additional rooms, terraces, and the car, with a clear view of the flat roof and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide glass doors, minimal steps, no porch, and a clean, open approach with landscaping.
